one_line_description: Document ingestion platform that parses, extracts, splits, and classifies complex documents (PDFs, scans, tables) for AI pipelines.
auth_summary: API key auth: create keys self-serve in Reducto Studio (studio.reducto.ai > API Keys), used via REDUCTO_API_KEY env var or client config in the official Python/Node SDKs; the MCP server uses a browser-based login that saves the key to ~/.reducto/config.yaml.
access_notes: Sign up at studio.reducto.ai and create an API key from the sidebar; official Python (reductoai on PyPI) and Node SDKs are public.
api_surface_summary: REST API (docs.reducto.ai) for document upload, parse (structured text/tables/figures), structured extraction against a JSON schema, split, and classify — a focused but complete document-processing surface.
agent_notes: Straightforward API-key SaaS with official SDKs and a vendor-published MCP package (mcp-server-reducto with tools upload_file/parse_document/extract_data/split_document/classify_document). I did not confirm free-tier limits/pricing for API usage; production volume is presumably paid.
